items.title: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 faces wrath of the Texas skies
items.body: SpaceX pushed Starship Flight 13 to Friday, blaming weather instead of the previous engine issues. The post SpaceX Starship Flight 13 faces wrath of the Texas skies appeared first on TESLARATI.
